description_long: This is a bracelet composed of a series of large, oval-shaped beads strung together and worn around the wrist. The beads are smooth and appear to be made of a light gray, possibly metallic or ceramic material, connected by smaller spherical links. The bracelet fits loosely, allowing the beads to move slightly along the wrist. The design is simple and unembellished, with a focus on the clean, geometric shapes of the beads. The overall appearance is modern and minimalist, suitable for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A minimalist bracelet with large, smooth oval beads connected by small links, worn around the wrist. The design is simple and modern, featuring a light gray color.
description_view_0: The bracelet is seen draped around the wrist, with the oval beads and connecting links clearly visible along the top and side.
description_view_1: A top-down view shows the full circular arrangement of the beads around the wrist, highlighting the even spacing and uniformity of the design.
description_view_2: The bracelet is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the underside of the wrist and the continuity of the bead pattern.
description_view_3: A direct overhead view emphasizes the circular form of the bracelet and the symmetrical placement of the beads around the wrist.
